title: Bulk Edit Mirrored Columns
excerpt: Hello, I think there might be a bug or at least a lack of a feature that should be by default. It looks like it’s not possible to batch edit mirrored columns. Is there any way to enable this?

posts.author: DiegoL (Diego)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I think there might be a bug or at least a lack of a feature that should be by default. It looks like it’s not possible to batch edit mirrored columns. Is there any way to enable this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Diego,

I am afraid there is no way to enable this feature at this time. You bring up a great suggestion, and we encourage you to submit this via our submit an idea section to increase votes and visibility
